command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static refund escalation review surface focused on the selected request, evidence gaps, decision path, and handoff reason.
parsed.css: :root { color-scheme: light; } * { box-sizing: border-box; } body { margin: 0; background: #eef1f4; color: #17202a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .refund-review { min-height: 900px; padding: 28px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f8fa 0%, #e8edf1 100%); } .topbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 22px; } .eyebrow { margin: 0 0 6px; color: #5b6776; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0; } h1, h2, h3, p { margin-top: 0; } h1 { margin-bottom: 0; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 0; } h2 { margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; } h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px; } .manager-pill { padding: 9px 13px; border: 1px solid #c7d1db; border-radius: 999px; background: #ffffff; color: #334155; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; } .layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 292px minmax(430px, 1fr) 384px; gap: 18px; align-items: start; } .panel { border: 1px solid #d6dee6; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(28, 39, 49, 0.08); } .queue { padding: 16px; } .queue-list { display: grid; gap: 10px; } .queue-item { width: 100%; min-height: 76px; border: 1px solid #d9e0e7; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #17202a; text-align: left; padding: 12px; cursor: default; } .queue-item.is-active { border-color: #246bfe; background: #eff5ff; box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #246bfe; } .queue-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px; font-weight: 800; } .queue-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; color: #5b6776; font-size: 13px; } .request-stack { display: grid; gap: 18px; } .request { padding: 18px; } .status-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e8ee; } .status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 28px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fff3d6; color: #7a4a00; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; white-space: nowrap; } .request-title { margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.2; } .request-subtitle { margin: 0; color: #5b6776; font-size: 14px; } .facts { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin: 16px 0; } .fact { padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e3e8ee; border-radius: 8px; background: #fafbfc; } .fact-label { margin-bottom: 4px; color: #667085; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0; } .fact-value { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; } .request-copy { margin-bottom: 0; color: #334155; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.5; } .evidence, .policy { padding: 18px; } .checklist { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; } .check-item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 98px 1fr; gap: 12px; align-items: start; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; } .tag { display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; min-width: 78px; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; } .tag.complete { background: #dff7ea; color: #146c43; } .tag.missing { background: #ffe5e5; color: #a52828; } .check-text { margin: 0; color: #263241; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.42; } .policy-copy { margin-bottom: 0; color: #263241; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; } .decision { padding: 18px; } .decision-note { margin-bottom: 16px; color: #5b6776; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; } .path-group { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .path-button { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid #cfd8e3; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #17202a; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-align: left; padding: 12px 14px; } .path-button.selected { border-color: #c43c3c; background: #fff4f2; color: #8f1f1f; box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #c43c3c; } .handoff-box { padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid #e3e8ee; } label { display: block; margin-bottom: 7px; color: #334155; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; } select, textarea { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #cfd8e3; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #17202a; font: inherit; } select { height: 42px; padding: 0 11px; margin-bottom: 14px; } textarea { min-height: 116px; padding: 11px; resize: none; line-height: 1.45; } .next-action { margin: 14px 0 16px; padding: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #246bfe; border-radius: 6px; background: #f1f6ff; color: #243b63; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; } .actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; } .secondary, .primary { min-height: 42px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; } .secondary { border: 1px solid #cfd8e3; background: #ffffff; color: #334155; } .primary { border: 1px solid #1f5fe0; background: #246bfe; color: #ffffff; } @media (max-width: 980px) { .refund-review { padding: 18px; } .layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .topbar { align-items: flex-start; flex-direction: column; } .facts { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
parsed.html:
Refund escalation review

R-1842 needs receipt before approval

Support operations manager

Refund queue

Selected request

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Evidence incomplete
Customer
Nora Diaz
Plan
Pro annual
Amount
$184.20

The support agent escalated the renewal dispute for manager approval. The renewal date and customer reason are available, but approval should wait until proof of purchase is attached.

Evidence checklist

  • Complete

    Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.

  • Complete

    Support note captures the customer's refund reason.

  • Missing

    Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.

Policy context

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Decision path

Choose the next refund path and leave the next owner with a clear reason for the decision.

Handoff reason

Next action: Return the request to the support agent with the missing evidence request.
